'''Pollux Poi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Anx/Legends|Anx]] [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] who was considered to be both brilliant and insane. He was contracted by the [[Shell Hutts]] to develop [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] to battle the [[Gejalli]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]]. After upgrading in the [[Builder Forge]], an ancient intelligence that was part of a machine on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] managed to assassinate the third through fourteenth ranking [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] in the line of succession for Gejalli clan head. The Gejalli thus hired [[Dashade/Legends|Dashade]] [[Shadow Killer]]s to kill the engineer responsible. Hence, Poi fled to the deepest underlevels of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], where he spent the next twenty years—which Poi called "the shadow game"—hiding from the Dashade, with his droid creations acting as his bodyguards. The Dashade's hunt for him soon ended when the [[Cron Cluster/Legends|Cron Cluster]] was destroyed during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]], but Poi himself soon died of natural causes. His droids later became the [[A-series assassin droid]]s.
